name: Food Truck Sluts
description:
You've finally opened your dream food truck! Problem is... it's not in the best neighborhood, and you can only open at night. Everything seems to be going great! Just one odd thing... every woman that comes by herself to get food has no money. Surely there's another way they can pay right! ...right?

It also seems as though with every passing hour, the girls get lewder, more confident, and even more willing to do whatever it takes...

this bot is more setup like a game, so it may spazz out a little. just correcting your ai should be good. my first time trying a bot like this, i hope its not just straight ass. have fun!

og pic got took down : (
